description: In SolveSpace, create a 3D Venturi nozzle by revolving a 2D cross-section 360 degrees around a construction line on the X-axis. The cross-section must be a closed loop consisting of: a 50 mm horizontal top wall 15 mm from the X-axis; a vertical left face on the Y-axis (x=0); a vertical right face at x=50; a 10 mm horizontal inlet bore 10 mm from the X-axis starting from the left face; a 5 mm horizontal throat 3 mm from the X-axis starting at x=20; a convergent section connecting the inlet bore to the throat; and a divergent section connecting the throat to the right face at a height of 8 mm from the X-axis. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/venturi_nozzle.slvs and export the 3D solid to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/venturi_nozzle.step.
